allow: Bash(docker compose exec redis redis-cli KEYS "*")
Bash(docker compose exec redis redis-cli --no-auth-warning KEYS "*")
Bash(docker compose exec -T redis redis-cli KEYS "*cache*")
Bash(docker compose exec -T redis redis-cli KEYS "*feed*")
Bash(docker compose exec -T redis redis-cli -n 1 DBSIZE)
Bash(docker compose exec -T web curl -s http://localhost:8000/metrics)
